title: Quantum Theory I
subject: Quantum Theory
learning_objectives: Formulate quantum mechanics using Dirac notation, Hilbert spaces, and abstract state vectors
Represent quantum states and operators in different bases and derive transformation rules
Derive and apply the Heisenberg and Schrödinger pictures of time evolution
Analyze angular momentum using raising and lowering operators and Clebsch-Gordan coefficients
Apply time-independent perturbation theory to degenerate and non-degenerate systems
Apply time-dependent perturbation theory including Fermi's golden rule and selection rules
Describe identical particles using symmetric and antisymmetric wavefunctions and second quantization
Compute scattering amplitudes and cross-sections using Born approximation and partial wave methods
Apply the WKB approximation and variational methods to solve quantum mechanical problems
